title: Elegant Macrame Table Runner
excerpt: Elevate your dining table with this stunning handcrafted macrame table runner.

steps.title: Plan dimensions
steps.description: Measure your table and plan for a runner about 1/3 the table width.

steps.title: Cut and mount
steps.description: Cut 40 cords at 5 times your desired length and mount on a temporary dowel.

steps.title: Create body
steps.description: Work alternating square knot patterns with decorative diamond shapes throughout.

steps.title: Finish both ends
steps.description: Remove from dowel, finish the starting end to match, and create matching fringes.

tips: Work the pattern from both ends toward the center for symmetry
Consider adding wooden or clay beads as accents
